title: Breakwave Weekend Read
summary:
Main
As the week comes to a close, take a moment to review the key insights from the past few days. We've gathered all the top insights for you to catch up at your convenience. VLCC Rates Face Reality Amid De-escalation, Lack of Disruptions - Following weeks of geopolitical tensions, the VLCC market is entering a phase of normalization after the landmark ceasefire agreement between Iran and Israel.
